title: Bounded AI Delegated Operator Prompt Template Execution
objective: Execute the second post-Packet-830 bounded delegated dual-lane packet by reusing the unchanged authoritative-host helper surface for a fresh admitted-trio live evidence tuple while publishing one reusable operator prompt template for later delegated packets under explicit coordinator ownership.
dependency_note: Packet 830 remains the helper-bootstrap-toolchains-python3-path floor and Packet 831 remains the first delegated dual-lane rehearsal floor. This packet reuses those preserved contracts and adds only a reusable operator prompt template as the new disjoint scaffold surface.
required_inputs: The current recommendation in PROJECT_STATUS.md that the next truthful move is another delegated dual-lane packet that reuses the Packet 830 helper floor plus the Packet 831 split checklist

The current delegated rehearsal floor and helper-floor wording in docs/operations/AI-BACKBONE-PARALLEL-HARDENING-BRIEF-2026-05-08.md and docs/operations/OLARES-AI-OPERATOR-REAL-WORLD-VALIDATION-MATRIX-2026-05-12.md
The delegated ownership, validation, and abort pattern in docs/operations/OLARES-AI-DELEGATED-DUAL-LANE-EXECUTION-CHECKLIST-2026-05-13.md
The existing helper execution surface and focused truthfulness suite
The published Packet 831 closeout evidence and operator prompt shape
constrained_outputs: One fresh Packet 832 admitted-trio live evidence tuple emitted through tools/ai/run_authoritative_host_packet.py under tests/canary/host-bootstrap-status/actual and tests/canary/mcp-contract/actual

One disjoint reusable operator prompt template at docs/operations/OLARES-AI-DELEGATED-DUAL-LANE-OPERATOR-PROMPT-TEMPLATE-2026-05-13.md that records the absolute-path copy-paste prompt skeleton for later delegated packets
One coordinator-owned closeout handoff for Packet 832 plus any needed PROJECT_STATUS.md routing update only after both lane validations and host parity restoration succeed
An explicit ABORTED closeout instead of partial success if lane ownership drifts, the helper surface requires mutation, or validation fails
validation_steps: Confirm Lane A reuses the existing helper unchanged and stays limited to the admitted apex-fs, apex-db, and apex-jobs trio plus repo-visible Packet 832 artifacts.
Confirm Lane A runs the focused helper truthfulness pytest slice before the live host packet and records the exact live helper command and result for Packet 832.
Confirm Lane B edits only the declared operator prompt template surface and validates it with a required-section and placeholder-anchor scan before coordinator closeout.
Confirm the coordinator updates shared publication surfaces only after both lane-level validations are green and the authoritative host returns to truthful not-running state.

Confirm any ownership drift, shared-file drift, helper-surface mutation need, MCP-service widening, auth or ingress widening, business-logic mutation, or failed lane validation is recorded as ABORTED rather than partial success.

lane_a.name: helper-driven live host evidence lane
allowed_actions: run the focused helper truthfulness pytest slice
publish only the Packet 832 artifact tuple emitted by the unchanged helper
forbidden_actions: changing auth, ingress, runtime posture, or business logic

lane_b.name: delegated operator prompt template lane
allowed_actions: author one repo-owned reusable operator prompt template for later delegated packets
reuse Packet 831 as the delegated split-governance floor and Packet 830 as the current helper-floor anchor
record the exact prompt sections, placeholder set, absolute-path requirement, validation order, abort rules, and closeout tuple fields needed for later delegated execution
forbidden_actions: editing live artifact files under tests/canary
changing auth, ingress, runtime posture, admitted services, or business logic

required_combined_checks: both lane-level validation tuples are present
the live helper result is PASS for Packet 832
the host returns to truthful not-running rest state
authoritative-host parity is restored without widening scope

sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes no SQL changes, no schema edits, no database writes outside the admitted helper-driven live trio path, and no feature-delivery mutation.
publication_note: Lane A and Lane B validated cleanly, the Packet 832 closeout set was published, and authoritative-host parity was restored at the same clean head without widening scope.
